<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>CSHealthED — EMS Training Platform</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Serif+Display&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: #f4f6fb; color: #1a2340; }

/* NAV */
nav {
  background: #0d2d6e; height: 68px; padding: 0 36px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #c0392b;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
}
nav.scrolled { box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
.nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; }
.nav-logo { width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; padding: 2px; object-fit: contain; }
.brand-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.brand-name { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.3px; }
.brand-name .cs { color: white; }
.brand-name .health { color: #2ec4b6; }
.brand-name .ed { color: #c0392b; }
.brand-sub { font-size: 10px; color: #8aaee0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.2px; font-weight: 500; }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; }
.nav-links a { color: #a8c0e8; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; padding: 7px 13px; border-radius: 6px; transition: all 0.15s; }
.nav-links a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: white; }
.nav-cta { background: #c0392b !important; color: white !important; font-weight: 600 !important; }
.nav-cta:hover { background: #a93226 !important; }

/* HERO */
.hero { background: #0d2d6e; padding: 88px 36px 80px; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.hero-glow { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 700px; height: 300px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(192,57,43,0.2) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; }
.hero-badge { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8aaee0; border: 1px solid rgba(138,174,224,0.3); border-radius: 20px; padding: 5px 18px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.hero h1 { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 62px); color: white; line-height: 1.1; font-weight: 400; max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto 20px; }
.hero h1 em { color: #c0392b; font-style: normal; }
.hero-sub { font-size: 18px; color: #8aaee0; max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto 40px; line-height: 1.65; }
.hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 9px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s; cursor: pointer; border: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
.btn-red { background: #c0392b; color: white; }
.btn-red:hover { background: #a93226; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-outline { background: transparent; color: white; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.28); }
.btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }

/* STATS */
.stats { background: white; border-bottom: 1px solid #dde3ef; }
.stats-inner { max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; }
.stat { flex: 1; padding: 24px 16px; text-align: center; border-right: 1px solid #dde3ef; }
.stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
.stat-n { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 800; color: #0d2d6e; line-height: 1; }
.stat-n.r { color: #c0392b; } .stat-n.t { color: #167a6b; } .stat-n.g { color: #1a8c4e; }
.stat-l { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #9aaac5; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; margin-top: 4px; }

/* SECTIONS */
section { padding: 76px 36px; }
.sec-inner { max-width: 920px; margin: 0 auto; }
.sec-tag { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c0392b; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.sec-title { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: clamp(28px, 3.8vw, 42px); font-weight: 400; color: #0d2d6e; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.sec-sub { font-size: 16px; color: #6b7a99; line-height: 1.65; max-width: 560px; margin-bottom: 44px; }

/* FEATURE GRID */
.feat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; }
.feat-card { background: white; border: 1px solid #dde3ef; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: all 0.18s; }
.feat-card:hover { border-color: #0d2d6e; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(13,45,110,0.08); }
.feat-icon { font-size: 26px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.feat-card h3 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #0d2d6e; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.feat-card p { font-size: 13px; color: #6b7a99; line-height: 1.6; }

/* LEVELS */
.levels-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 16px; }
.level-card { background: white; border: 1px solid #dde3ef; border-radius: 12px; padding: 22px 16px; text-align: center; border-top: 4px solid #0d2d6e; transition: all 0.15s; }
.level-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); }
.lc-emr { border-top-color: #167a6b; }
.lc-emt { border-top-color: #0d2d6e; }
.lc-aemt { border-top-color: #d68910; }
.lc-para { border-top-color: #c0392b; }
.lv-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.lb-emr { background: #e0f2ee; color: #167a6b; }
.lb-emt { background: #e8eef9; color: #0d2d6e; }
.lb-aemt { background: #fdf3e0; color: #d68910; }
.lb-para { background: #faeaea; color: #c0392b; }
.level-card h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2340; margin-bottom: 7px; }
.level-card p { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7a99; line-height: 1.6; }

/* DELIVERABLES */
.deliv-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.deliv-item { background: white; border: 1px solid #dde3ef; border-radius: 11px; padding: 17px 18px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; }
.deliv-num { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0d2d6e; color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }
.deliv-item h4 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #0d2d6e; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.deliv-item p { font-size: 13px; color: #6b7a99; line-height: 1.5; }

/* TOPICS */
.topics-wrap { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 9px; }
.topic-chip { background: white; border: 1px solid #dde3ef; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 13px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a2340; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: all 0.15s; }
.topic-chip:hover { border-color: #0d2d6e; background: #eef2ff; color: #0d2d6e; cursor: default; }
.dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
.dot-navy { background: #0d2d6e; }
.dot-red { background: #c0392b; }
.dot-teal { background: #167a6b; }
.dot-orange { background: #d68910; }
.dot-green { background: #1a8c4e; }

/* CTA BAND */
.cta-band { background: #0d2d6e; text-align: center; padding: 80px 36px; }
.cta-band h2 { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: clamp(30px, 4.5vw, 48px); color: white; font-weight: 400; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.cta-band p { color: #8aaee0; font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 36px; }

/* FOOTER */
footer { background: #07183a; padding: 32px 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; }
.footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.footer-logo { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; padding: 2px; object-fit: contain; }
.footer-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
.footer-copy { color: #3d5a8a; font-size: 12px; }

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  nav { padding: 0 18px; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .hero { padding: 60px 20px 64px; }
  section { padding: 54px 20px; }
  .levels-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .stats-inner { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .stat { min-width: 50%; border-bottom: 1px solid #dde3ef; }
  footer { padding: 24px 20px; flex-direction: column; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="main-nav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-brand">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CSHealthED logo" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="brand-text">
      <div class="brand-name"><span class="cs">CS</span><span class="health">Health</span><span class="ed">ED</span></div>
      <div class="brand-sub">Healthcare Education Software</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#features">Features</a>
    <a href="#levels">Levels</a>
    <a href="#topics">Topics</a>
    <a href="ems_builder.html" class="nav-cta">Launch builder →</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-badge">Powered by National EMS Education Standards</div>
  <h1>Build <em>EMS training curricula</em><br>in minutes, not hours</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">CSHealthED generates complete course outlines, slide content, and instructor notes — aligned to NEMS standards and tailored to your provider level, duration, and clinical focus.</p>
  <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="ems_builder.html" class="btn-hero btn-red">Launch curriculum builder →</a>
    <a href="#features" class="btn-hero btn-outline">See what it generates</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="stats">
  <div class="stats-inner">
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n">40+</div><div class="stat-l">EMS topics</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n r">4</div><div class="stat-l">Provider levels</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n t">5</div><div class="stat-l">Deliverable types</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n g">&lt;60s</div><div class="stat-l">Time to curriculum</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section id="features" style="background:#f4f6fb;">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="sec-tag">Platform features</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Everything an EMS educator needs</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">From a one-hour refresher to a full 40-hour EMT course — CSHealthED builds structured, clinically accurate materials fast.</p>
    <div class="feat-grid">
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">📋</div><h3>Course outlines</h3><p>Timed session plans with objectives, content hierarchy, and skill station breakdowns.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">🖥️</div><h3>Slide content</h3><p>Slide-by-slide titles, bullets, and speaker notes — ready to paste into PowerPoint or Google Slides.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">📝</div><h3>Instructor notes</h3><p>Facilitation tips, common student errors, clinical pearls, and debrief guide questions.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">🎯</div><h3>Learning objectives</h3><p>Measurable, verb-based objectives aligned to NEMS standards and NREMT scope of practice.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">✅</div><h3>Assessment questions</h3><p>MCQs, scenario prompts, and answer rationales for post-class or skills evaluation.</p></div>
      <div class="feat-card"><div class="feat-icon">⚙️</div><h3>Fully configurable</h3><p>Set duration from 1 hour to 40 hours. Choose provider level. Add a specific clinical focus.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LEVELS -->
<section id="levels" style="background:white; border-top:1px solid #dde3ef;">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="sec-tag">Provider levels</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Tailored to every certification level</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Content, scope of practice, and interventions are automatically adjusted based on who you're teaching.</p>
    <div class="levels-grid">
      <div class="level-card lc-emr"><div class="lv-badge lb-emr">EMR</div><h3>Emergency Medical Responder</h3><p>Basic life support, airway management, bleeding control, and initial assessment.</p></div>
      <div class="level-card lc-emt"><div class="lv-badge lb-emt">EMT</div><h3>Emergency Medical Technician</h3><p>Full primary and secondary assessment, BLS, AED, oxygen therapy, medications.</p></div>
      <div class="level-card lc-aemt"><div class="lv-badge lb-aemt">AEMT</div><h3>Advanced EMT</h3><p>IV access, fluid resuscitation, advanced airways, expanded medication formulary.</p></div>
      <div class="level-card lc-para"><div class="lv-badge lb-para">Paramedic</div><h3>Paramedic</h3><p>Full ALS: 12-lead ECG, RSI, chest decompression, cardiac monitoring, ACLS drugs.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DELIVERABLES -->
<section style="background:#f4f6fb; border-top:1px solid #dde3ef;">
  <div class="sec-inner" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:center;">
    <div>
      <div class="sec-tag">What you get</div>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Five deliverables, one click</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Select what you need before generating — each deliverable outputs as a separate, copyable tab.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="deliv-list">
      <div class="deliv-item"><div class="deliv-num">1</div><div><h4>Course outline</h4><p>Timed session plan with objectives and key content for your selected duration.</p></div></div>
      <div class="deliv-item"><div class="deliv-num">2</div><div><h4>Slide content</h4><p>Slide titles, bullets, and speaker notes formatted for PowerPoint or Google Slides.</p></div></div>
      <div class="deliv-item"><div class="deliv-num">3</div><div><h4>Instructor notes</h4><p>Teaching tips, clinical pearls, common errors, and debrief questions.</p></div></div>
      <div class="deliv-item"><div class="deliv-num">4</div><div><h4>Learning objectives</h4><p>NEMS-aligned objectives for cognitive, affective, and psychomotor domains.</p></div></div>
      <div class="deliv-item"><div class="deliv-num" style="background:#c0392b;">5</div><div><h4>Assessment questions</h4><p>MCQs and scenario prompts with answer rationales for evaluation.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TOPICS -->
<section id="topics" style="background:white; border-top:1px solid #dde3ef;">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="sec-tag">Topic library</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title">40+ EMS topics, organized by discipline</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Every topic maps to the National EMS Education Standards curriculum framework.</p>
    <div class="topics-wrap">
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-teal"></span>Airway management</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Patient assessment</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Cardiac emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Respiratory emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Hemorrhage control</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-orange"></span>Trauma overview</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-orange"></span>Head and spine trauma</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-orange"></span>Chest trauma</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-orange"></span>Burns</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Stroke and neurology</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Diabetic emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Anaphylaxis</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Toxicology</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Shock management</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-red"></span>Cardiac arrest and CPR</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-teal"></span>Pediatric emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-teal"></span>Obstetric emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-teal"></span>Geriatric emergencies</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-teal"></span>Neonatal resuscitation</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>MCI and triage</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Hazmat awareness</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Vehicle extrication</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Incident command</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Pharmacology</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-navy"></span>Documentation</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-green"></span>EMS systems</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-green"></span>Medical/legal and ethics</div>
      <div class="topic-chip"><span class="dot dot-green"></span>Workforce safety</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="cta-band">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <h2>Ready to build better EMS education?</h2>
    <p>Select a topic, configure your class, and get a complete curriculum in under a minute.</p>
    <a href="ems_builder.html" class="btn-hero btn-red" style="font-size:16px; padding:16px 36px;">Launch curriculum builder →</a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CSHealthED" class="footer-logo">
    <div class="footer-name"><span style="color:white">CS</span><span style="color:#2ec4b6">Health</span><span style="color:#c0392b">ED</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 CSHealthED · Healthcare Education Software · All rights reserved</div>
</footer>

<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  document.getElementById('main-nav').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 10);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
